title: Excalibur | Ocean's Delight Support
body:
![Main](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49ce5ea7ac86651e1e58d491fd885951a00072d0.png)
This is a support pack that makes the textures from [Ocean's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/oceans-delight) mod match the medieval style of [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal).

Note: ignore incompatibility warning for this pack. This is just because of the pack format value, which doesn't matter for this specific pack.

### **Features:**
- Retexture of all items
- Retexture of the Guardian Soup block

### **Showcase:**
![Default Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16ba6990f2d4827d264b6292cde98dbd4010e418.png)
![Excalibur Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d49547e35534c8812de3795355b20ccd53ac2b4.png)
![Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13edee0e399606504b384b34c7029afdf1837415.png)

### **Credit:**
- Maffhew - Author of [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal)
- scouter567 - Author of [Ocean's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/oceans-delight)
